warehouseQuery.query:
select * 
from PRD_BDS.FINANCE_GENERAL.MRT_DIM_DEBTORS_TRACKER_ROLES
where VALID_TO is null

properties.script: assert ( in0.filter((~isnull(col("COMMENTS"))) & (~(isnull(col("COMMENTS")) | (length(col("COMMENTS")) == lit(0)))) & ((col("COMMENTS") != lit("")) | isnull(col("COMMENTS"))) & (length(col("COMMENTS")) > lit(5))).count() > 0 )
